    58.Speaker 0: ...thrashed 'is arm with my bare hands. Weaker than pixies, humans.note: If possible, he should be holding mug of beer. He's talking to the other goblins. It would also be cool if he could somehow interact with the corpse on the ground by pointing at it or sneering down at it.

        94.Speaker 0: And who're you? 'Nother pest? Humans... think ya rule the world. Hah!note: <placeholder>HumanDwarfElfGithyankiHalf-Orc+4 more!GOB_Checkpoint_State_Paint

                      • Dwarf
                      Or I'll wipe that nasty look off yer face, thick-skull.
                      ha317dc73g0c15g4405ga1c2g20bd342e99fd | fc3f72a2-dcf6-4ca0-5c6c-2620999e5f5a | stub

                      Variant 5

                      Or I'll wipe that nasty look right off yer face.
                      hf53ad36ag040eg472cga63bga73e7a6ca563 | fc4d1f2b-8264-ce71-0186-8dd08088e7ba | stub

                                217.Narrator: *You kneel before him, eagerly feigning reverence.*note: We are on our knees, the goblin is looking down at us. close-up of his foot: his nails are cracked and black with mud, but we should clearly see a ring glittering on his big left toe. Same as N173

                                        • +
                                          219.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Don't be so quick to judge. Every scar and sigil on my body serves a purpose - there's beauty in them.note: <placeholder>

                                          Metadata

                                  140.Player: Apologise and drop to your knees.

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 86f49065-e364-c07f-e70a-ecb77d5acb92Speaker: 4 (Player)Text Handle: h1d486955g6c97g434bgb7b4g96acf2b1e0e2Text UUID: e2724be0-123d-2f2f-abe9-dc1987234852Show Once: True
                                  • +
                                    83.Speaker 0: Thought so.note: We are on our knees, the goblin is looking down at us. close-up of his foot: his nails are cracked and black with mud, but we should clearly see a ring glittering on his big left toe.GOB_DrunkGoblin_Event_NoticedRing

                                    Flags and Tags

                                    settype Object | speaker 4 Player

                                            141.Speaker 0: Ugh, didya see? He did it. Gross.note: Even though he's talking to the other goblins, he's still looking at the player, who is still on his knees. The surrounding goblins (3) cackle.MaleFemaleGOB_DrunkGoblin_HasKissed

                                                    178.Origin_Intro_Laezel: You'd yield to a mere maggot? Chk. I didn't think you so depraved.ORI_Inclusion_PickedAtRandomLae'zel

                                                215.Speaker 0: What?! You... you swine.note: The goblin yelps and stumbles backwards. The other goblins start laughing. He sneers and looks around, realising the other goblins (3) are laughing at him, and becomes even angrier. The player gets back up.

                                              156.Narrator: *The pleasant scent gives way to the muddy taste of something you try not to identify. You carefully slide the ring off.*note: <placeholder>GOB_DrunkGoblin_Event_RingStolen

                                              Flags and Tags

                                              tagstype node | speaker -666 Narrator
                                              • Narration {4cb0fac6-1396-46ff-8554-e64bc2635909}
                                              settype Object | speaker 4 Player
                                              • GOB_DrunkGoblin_Event_RingStolen {78805014-8f74-a0ef-9a4b-2f608e31e4e7} = True

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9a9d6888-c5e5-e075-13b3-dda080ac7e06Speaker: -666 (Narrator)Text Handle: h9cf12f1egea35g4b42g8083ge61e2189aa17Text UUID: 7a9d5af9-8de2-18f1-a784-74226e2f74f5Group ID: 55708f42-e40f-6402-9708-55da04c5ba47Group Index: 1
                                              • +
                                                205.Speaker 0: You enjoyin' that? Disgustin' worm. Just remember: you're nuffing 'ere.note: We're at his feet still, so he's talking down to us. We get up during the last sentence.GOB_DrunkGoblin_Event_MoveToSecludedPlace

                                                Flags and Tags

                                                              112.Origin_Intro_Karlach: Good gods. What else can you do with that tongue?

          • See Node 119 (Player) Lot of assumptions here. I don't think I'm better than anyone else.
